# bash completion for ooxml
_ooxml()
{
    local cur="${COMP_WORDS[COMP_CWORD]}"
    local commands="apply agent agent-triage capabilities completion conformance convert diff doctor docx find help inspect mcp pptx repair robot-docs serve template validate vba verify version xlsx"
    if [[ $COMP_CWORD -eq 1 ]]; then
        COMPREPLY=( $(compgen -W "$commands" -- "$cur") )
    else
        COMPREPLY=()
    fi
}
complete -F _ooxml ooxml
